text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our second summer camp, and Seiun Sky's
motivation is at an all time low. But King Halo
comes around to drag her along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope this lack of enthusiasm is just a
performance like always. Our summer camp
begins with my unease fully intact.
